question.label: Question habit
question.name: What stops you from asking more questions earlier?
question.description: Gets at the behavior behind low question volume without assuming the cause.

answer: I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.

assessment.note: He says explicit expectations are missing, which signals mild clarity, engagement, and growth drag; no clear wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Next behavior
new_queue.name: What would you do differently on the next cross-team piece?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 8)

I have not built enough trust with adjacent teams yet.
I need explicit expectations for the next cycle so I can calibrate fast.
